Welcome to
Jamaican Jerk Biz
About Us
JAMAICAN JERK BIZ...DRINK,DINE & VIBE
Jamaican Jerk Biz was established within the confines of our kitchen which was a humble initiative we took that had the Atlanta community yearning to satisfy their tastebuds every day since inception. With the love and support extended by the people we manage to expand to a single tent and a grill at a location and later a fully loaded food truck and now we blossomed into Brick N Mortar.
. Bringing Jamaica to Atlanta Georgia with our original homemade seasonings and spices specially crafted to mesmerize our menu of Authentic Jerk Chicken, Jerk Salmon, Jerk Shrimp to name a few of our soul fillers.
Book a place >
